mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in PAYEMS signals rising household income and lower near-term recession risk, which raises expected earnings and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot before decision date was 152252 thousand
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month PAYEMS growth does not produce positive 20-day return spread versus lower PAYEMS growth, or if walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 for three consecutive years.

mechanism_narrative: A downward crossing of FEDFUNDS below its 6-month moving average signals policy easing that lowers equity discount rates, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses below its 6-month moving average after being above it in the prior month
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot before decision date was 1.55 percent
failure_condition: Reject if triggered easing crossings are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of cases or have a mean return no higher than non-triggered months.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS is rising while UNRATE is at or below 4%, strong consumption and tight labor markets reinforce revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth is positive and UNRATE is at or below 4.0%
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot before decision date was 3.5 percent
failure_condition: Reject if the joint RSAFS-positive and UNRATE-low condition has no incremental 20-day return advantage over RSAFS alone or UNRATE alone in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in INDPRO while PAYEMS continues to expand signals margin pressure and late-cycle inventory stress, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 6-month change is negative and PAYEMS 6-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot before decision date was 108.6714
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time or if the interaction term has the wrong sign in rolling regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month acceleration in HOUST signals improving residential investment and durable-goods demand, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its 12-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot before decision date was 1314 thousand units
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST upward crossings are not followed by higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than downward crossings, or if the return spread is negative over two consecutive expansions.

mechanism_narrative: Acceleration in CPIAUCSL while FEDFUNDS is not falling signals inflation pressure without offsetting policy relief, raising real discount-rate uncertainty and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds its 12-month growth and FEDFUNDS 3-month change is greater than or equal to 0
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot before decision date was 257.936
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL acceleration and non-easing FEDFUNDS interaction is followed by positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE from its cycle low signals deteriorating labor demand and rising recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses 0.3 percentage points above its trailing 12-month minimum
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot before decision date was 3.5 percent
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE deterioration episodes have non-negative average 60-day S&P 500 returns or fail to underperform non-triggered periods by at least 1 percentage point.

mechanism_narrative: A positive monthly rebound in INDPRO after weakness signals improving production and inventory normalization, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as cyclical risk premia compress.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 1-month change crosses from negative to positive
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot before decision date was 108.6714
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO reversal crossings do not generate a positive mean 5-day S&P 500 return or if hit rate falls below 50% in walk-forward validation.
